title: Entity Play Dead Behavior
description: Allows this entity to pretend to be dead to avoid being targeted by attackers.

apply_regeneration.title: Apply Regeneration
apply_regeneration.description: Whether the mob will receive the regeneration effect while playing dead.

damage_sources.title: Damage Sources
damage_sources.description: The list of Entity Damage Sources that will cause this mob to play dead.

duration.title: Duration
duration.description: The amount of time the mob will remain playing dead (in seconds).

domain.title: Domain
domain.description: The domain the test should be performed in.

subject.title: Subject
subject.description: The subject of this filter test.

test.title: Test
test.description: The name of the test to apply.

value.title: Value
value.description: The value being compared with the test.

filters.title: Filters
filters.description:
The list of other triggers that are required for the mob to activate play dead

Properties:
• domain (object)
• operator (object)
• subject (object)
• test (string)
• value (object)

force_below_health.title: Force Below Health
force_below_health.description: The amount of health at which damage will cause the mob to play dead.

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.

random_damage_range.title: Random Damage Range
random_damage_range.description:
The range of damage that may cause the goal to start depending on randomness. Damage taken below the min will never cause the goal to start. Damage taken above the max will always cause the goal to start.

Properties:
• max (int) = 0
• min (int) = 0

random_start_chance.title: Random Start Chance
random_start_chance.description: The likelihood of this goal starting upon taking damage.
